title: meibomia annua
intro: Meibomia annua, also known as Annual Tick-trefoil, is a perennial herb native to the southeastern United States, belonging to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. It is valued for its health benefits, such as treating fever, sore throats, and skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Meibomia annua can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
